description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a rich, glossy chocolate ganache dripping down the sides. The top of the cake is decorated with evenly spaced dollops of white whipped cream, each topped with a bright red cherry-like sphere. A single red candle stands upright in the center of the cake, adding a celebratory touch. The cake sits on a smooth, white circular plate that contrasts with the dark chocolate and vibrant decorations. The cake's body appears to be a dense, chocolate sponge, visible beneath the ganache. The overall appearance is festive and inviting, suitable for birthdays or celebrations in an urban park or street party.
description: A round chocolate cake with glossy ganache, white whipped cream dollops, red cherry decorations, and a central red candle, displayed on a white plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central red candle, all whipped cream dollops, and cherries clearly arranged on top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the candle still centered, but some whipped cream dollops and cherries are partially obscured.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 0, with the candle and most decorations visible, but the leftmost decorations are less prominent.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, showing the candle and decorations from the back, with the arrangement of cherries and cream still visible.
